title: Replace strings.SplitN with strings.Cut
body:
Cut is a cleaner & more performant api relative to SplitN(_, _, 2) added in go 1.18

Previously applied this refactoring to buildah: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5239

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```release-note
None
```
